ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the data (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or status of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "geographical_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the dataset */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., satellite, weather station) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the source was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance of the source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category */,
  "data_quality_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for assessing the quality of data in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the temperature data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the temperature data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the temperature data was collected */,
  "dekad" INTEGER /* Dekad the temperature data was collected */,
  "anomaly_1_month" REAL /* Anomaly of temperature for 1 month */,
  "anomaly_3_months" REAL /* Anomaly of temperature for 3 months */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of temperature */,
  "average" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precipitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the precipitation data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the precipitation data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the precipitation data was collected */,
  "dekad" INTEGER /* Dekad the precipitation data was collected */,
  "precipitation_level" REAL /* Level of precipitation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the precipitation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precipitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_files" (
  "version_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the version file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the version file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the version file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
